meaning: n.微光,隐约的一瞥adj.薄弱地发光的
examples: Then she had a nightmare—a walking corpse, glimmering yellow eyes.
She had become my glimmering girl: She looked like a rock star.
What I notice most of all is the glimmering hope in the faces of the women employees.
So maximize your chances of a positive retelling by telling your own story in a glimmering light.
